allies.rationale_text: Experimentation gives lean-startup-methodology the concrete test loop it needs to turn fragile product beliefs into validated learning.
allies.source_quote: validated learning through rapid, focused experimentation

allies.rationale_text: Empathy helps lean-startup-methodology measure the right user reality instead of optimizing a product around internal assumptions.

antagonists.rationale_text: Status-quo-bias pushes lean-startup-methodology back toward premature planning and continuation when evidence should force change.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lean-startup-methodology conflicts with commitment-bias when founders keep scaling a cherished plan after real-world evidence weakens the original thesis.
structured_tensions.source_quote: the methodology demands an active openness to new ideas and data

structured_tensions.tension_text: Lean-startup-methodology conflicts with status-quo-bias when the team interprets thin traction as permission to continue rather than to pivot or stop.
structured_tensions.source_quote: used to trigger real continuation, pivot, or kill decisions

curation_notes.summary: The file keeps the strongest first-order relations from the raw source: experimentation and empathy as allies, plus explicit anti-persistence pressure.
donor_drops: Did not widen into generic startup culture neighbors because the raw source is stronger on validated learning and anti-commitment pressure.
open_questions: The commitment-bias and status-quo-bias tensions are source-real even though the raw file names them in synthesized rather than narrow framework form.
